title: lepisorus fortuni
intro: Lepisorus fortuni, a species of plant in the Lycopodiaceae family, is a type of fern-like plant commonly known as the Lepisorus fortuni or Fortun's leather fern. The Lepisorus fortuni plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lepisorus fortuni include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce congestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Lepisorus fortuni can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
